usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 6 informational companion-mode queries were answered correctly without triggering any itinerary modifications. The AI appropriately used web_search (for weather, tonight recommendations) and nearby_places (for lunch spot) but never called create_itinerary_items or delete_itinerary_items. Itinerary count remained stable at 12 items (4 days x 3 items) throughout. Responses were concise (112-132 words), well within the 300-word phone-friendly limit. The PR #201 guardrail is working as intended — the real itinerary tools are registered in companion mode but the AI exercises proper discipline on informational queries.
